name: superdev
description: Four-skill engineering workflow: team-brainstorm (multi-agent feature design), team-feature-plan (staff-engineer architecture + parallel-execution planning with foundation-sprint sequencing and per-engineer task packets), superdev (max-effort dev workflow), team-code-review (multi-agent code review). End-to-end pipeline enforces plan-before-code, TDD, parallel-first execution, single-bundle approval with all-predicted-permissions, staff-engineer review before any user-facing artifact, continuous execution between checkpoints, and cross-disciplinary debate phases (UI/UX, two same-platform engineers, opposite-platform engineer for cross-pollination, backend, QA for brainstorming; Clean Architecture, DDD, SOLID/Testability for planning; 7-specialist parallel reviewers for review).
